message:
feat(messaging): session conformance monitor, durable NDJSON stream backend, fabric decision contracts, and explain plans

src/messaging/session/conformance.rs:
- Replace placeholder with full runtime session conformance monitor that
  checks observations against projected local session type transitions
- Add ConformanceMonitor with role tracking, path cursor, violation
  detection, timeout/evidence/recovery metadata surfacing
- Add SessionConformanceError with 12 violation variants (out-of-turn,
  unexpected-message, deadline-exceeded, evidence-missing, etc.)
- Add ConformanceReport with pass/fail/violation summary
- Comprehensive test suite: happy path, out-of-turn, unexpected message,
  branch selection, recursive protocol, timeout enforcement

src/messaging/session/mod.rs:
- Re-export conformance module types

src/messaging/stream.rs:
- Add NdjsonStorageBackend: durable append-only NDJSON file storage with
  in-memory index for O(1) sequence lookups and O(log n) range queries
- Make StorageBackend methods return Result<_, StreamError> instead of
  bare values, enabling I/O error propagation from durable backends
- Add Serialize/Deserialize to StreamRecord for NDJSON round-tripping
- Add NdjsonCompactionPolicy and compact() for log file maintenance
- Tests: NDJSON append/get/range, compaction, crash-recovery simulation

src/messaging/fabric.rs:
- Integrate franken_decision crate for decision-contract evaluation on
  fabric publish/reply paths (LossMatrix, Posterior, evaluate())
- Add FabricDecisionRecord for audit trail of decision evaluations
- Add explain plan integration via ExplainPlan/ExplainDecisionSpec
- Add decision_records tracking to FabricState
- Expand FabricCellRuntime with admission control, obligation lifecycle,
  and certified request/reply flow orchestration
- Update mod.rs re-exports

src/messaging/explain.rs:
- Add ExplainPlan and ExplainDecisionSpec types for data-plane decision
  introspection (query plan style)
- Add DataPlaneDecisionKind enum

src/messaging/nats.rs:
- Fix request-reply interleaving: track processed_any flag per parse loop
  iteration and only call read_more/read_more_until when no messages were
  parsed, preventing blocking reads when replies arrive between parse
  attempts (applies to both request() and consume())

tests/fabric_lab_integration.rs:
- Add certified-request scenario infrastructure and test helpers
- Add service admission + obligation tracking assertions

tests/fabric_replay_scenarios.rs:
- Fix import path consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
